rows.label: qev019101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hmmm... To think one can produce a
material harder than steel from this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Alien technology is truly
a wondrous thing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0003
rows.name:
...You there. Are you familiar with
this substance known as "Miranium"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0004
rows.name:
I heard from a Ma-non, but it seems
this is an ore of uncommon usefulness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev019101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell him everything you know about
the usefulness of Miranium.

rows.label: qev019101_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev019101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask him for details about
how Miranium is used.

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ho... You are knowledgeable.
Is it truly that useful?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0006
rows.name:
If so, I can understand why the Six
Stars are desperately gathering it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0007
rows.name:
I only came into contact with
it after arriving in this city.
I do not know the details.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0008
rows.name:
However, I hear that depending on the processing
method, it can become harder than steel, or be
fashioned into a material as flexible as a spring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0009
rows.name:
The Ma-non seem to have already
developed technology to use
it as a power source.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0010
rows.name:
As an artisan, it is deeply fascinating.
I would very much like to try the
refining methods I've heard about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Say, this Miranium is something
you BLADEs gather, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0012
rows.name:
10000gm would be plenty... If you please,
could you fetch some for me as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0013
rows.name:
If I can learn to refine this, I am
certain I can bring something to this
city that only a Larsian can make.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Very well, in the meantime,
I shall study Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0015
rows.name:
I cannot let what you
painstakingly obtain go to waste.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0016
rows.name:
An artisan like myself who belongs
to no corporation has no choice but
to rely on a BLADE like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0017
rows.name:
I swear it shall not go to waste.
Please, I ask that you obtain
around 10000gm of Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0018
rows.name:
[ST:playername ], you've returned! How did
things go on your end?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0019
rows.name:
I was able to hear many valuable stories
from an Earthling named Kirsty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_JNK0030
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev019101_SEL0031
rows.name: Hand over 10000gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev019101_JNK0040
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev019101_SEL0041
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Oh! That is a massive
amount of Miranium![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Say, did you obtain this using that
thing called Frontier Net as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Well, you see, Kirsty taught
me about that as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0023
rows.name:
When I showed interest, she even gave
me a Data Probe that I could handle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0024
rows.name:
It's a rare opportunity, so I'd
like to test it out... Are you
accustomed to handling this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev019101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Answer with confidence that
you are accustomed to it.

rows.label: qev019101_JNK0060
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev019101_SEL0061
rows.name:
State that you are still not
accustomed to handling it.

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0025
rows.name:
As expected of a BLADE. I fear...
even after hearing how to use
it, I hardly understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0026
rows.name:
If you wouldn't mind, could
you teach me how to use it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0027
rows.name:
When I mentioned you, Kirsty said you
were a very excellent student, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0028
rows.name:
No need for modesty. Say, if
you wouldn't mind, could you
teach me how to use it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0029
rows.name:
I obtained the Miranium... but I
cannot rely on you forever. We
Larsians must also be self-sufficient.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Will you do it? I will be waiting
in Valley of Oblivion, so come
when you are prepared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0031
rows.name:
I see. Then call out to me again
once you have obtained the
Miranium. I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0032
rows.name:
You came! Say, this Data Probe
thing, I just need to stab it
in right here, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Teach me how to use it right away!
I should tell you, I've forgotten
almost everything Kirsty told me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0034
rows.name:
If possible, it would help if you taught
me carefully. Handling machines is outside
my expertise; I'm quite bad at it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_JNK0070
rows.name: Polite

rows.label: qev019101_SEL0071
rows.name: Teach him carefully from step one.

rows.label: qev019101_JNK0080
rows.name: Strict

rows.label: qev019101_SEL0081
rows.name:
Dare to push him away and leave
it to Go-Shiro's own initiative.

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0035
rows.name: I see... I do this part like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0036
rows.name:
...No? What? That is
how it is installed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0037
rows.name:
...This is wrong too?!
Then what should I do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0038
rows.name: Guh... Gah! How troublesome! Take this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0039
rows.name:
I see. In the way of the sword, one
must also begin with actual combat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Good! Then I do this
part like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0041
rows.name: Then that... and this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0042
rows.name: Hmph... Now! How is this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0044
rows.name: ...What on earth was the problem...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0045
rows.name:
...No, I admit I handled
it a bit roughly, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0046
rows.name:
Say, I'm sorry... Could you go ask
Kirsty for another Data Probe for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0047
rows.name:
Please... I won't make such
a mistake next time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0048
rows.name:
Was my application of force incorrect?
To think it would break so easily...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0049
rows.name:
Please... I won't make such a mistake
next time, so please ask Kirsty for
another Data Probe for me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0050
rows.name: Oh! Did you get the Data Probe for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0051
rows.name:
This time for sure, I will install
it properly. Come on, hand it over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0052
rows.name:
It's fine, having tried it once,
I've grasped the knack. I mostly
remember the method, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0053
rows.name:
All that's left is... do you have any
advice? What kind of feelings do you
usually have when installing this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_JNK0090
rows.name: Selfless

rows.label: qev019101_SEL0091
rows.name:
Say you install it wishing for the
future and prosperity of humanity.

rows.label: qev019101_JNK0100
rows.name: Selfish

rows.label: qev019101_SEL0101
rows.name:
Say you install it thinking
about the income you will gain.

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0054
rows.name:
Something you carry on your
shoulders... huh. That's right...
I have similar feelings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0055
rows.name:
The reason I'm studying this is half
because I thought it would bring benefit
to the impoverished Larsians...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0056
rows.name:
Yeah... Thinking of that, I surely
cannot carelessly smash it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0057
rows.name:
Thank you. With that mindset, I
will challenge it once more![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0058
rows.name:
Does Frontier Net truly bring
such massive benefits...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0059
rows.name:
If so, then eventually I too shall
use those benefits to own a great
workshop and achieve great success...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0060
rows.name:
And someday, I will save the
Larsians from this poverty![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0061
rows.name:
...Now, let's go! I shall strike
the foundation for Larsian
prosperity into this land of Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0062
rows.name:
I did it... I did it! With this,
Miranium can be obtained, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0063
rows.name:
Thank you, [ST:playername ]! From now on, I
too will expand Frontier Net
everywhere on this Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0064
rows.name:
And with that, I'll carve out the future
for the Larsians! Just like you BLADEs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0065
rows.name:
...Right, for now I'll return
and try to see what kind of
things can be made with Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0066
rows.name:
Leave it to me, I'll make something
only we can make and prove useful
to you Earthlings as well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019101_MSG0067
rows.name:
What you taught me, what you gave me[ST:wide ]— I
swear I will not let it go to waste![ST:wait ]
